ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED AND CASE DISMISSED UNTIL SUCH TIME AS PLAINTIFF FIRST BRINGS HIS ACTION BEFORE THE S.F. RENT BOARD. (SEE DELAURA V. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF

Appearances: Justin Goodman (no card provided) for plaintiff and opposing party; Kim Shindel of the Aids Legal Referral Panel (415.701.1200) and Robert C. Smith (415.294.1465) for defendant and moving party.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED and case dismissed until such time as Plaintiff first brings his action before the S.F. Rent Board. (See DeLaura v. Beckett (2006) 137 Cal.App.4th 542.) Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR 8052 (Tel: 925.360.6065)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Continued To May-13-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER COMPAGNO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to May 13, 2016 on Court's own motion. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
